'''Charis''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Charis system/Legends|system of the same name]] on the [[Trition Trade Route]] in the [[Kathol sector/Legends|Kathol sector]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]. An important industrial base for the [[Sector/Legends|sector]], the population of the planet staged an [[Charis uprising|uprising]] against the local [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Warlord/Legends|warlord]]—[[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Kentor Sarne]]—and his [[Moff Sarne's forces|forces]] in [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]]. Sarne's forces [[Subjugation of Charis|assaulted]] the world, laying waste to many of the major [[City/Legends|cities]] and reducing the planetary population from one billion to 850 million. Following the disintegration of Sarne's authority in the sector with the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic's]] [[Battle of Kal'Shebbol|liberation]] of the sector [[Capital/Legends|capital]] [[Kal'Shebbol/Legends|Kal'Shebbol]] in [[8 ABY/Legends|8 ABY]], the population of Charis prepared to stage a second uprising to free their world.

==Description==
Charis was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located in the [[Charis system/Legends|Charis system]] on the [[Trition Trade Route]] in the [[Kathol sector/Legends|Kathol sector]]<ref name="tdc" /> of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].<ref name="TEA-OC" /> It was at the center of five [[Hyperspace route/Legends|travel routes]] that joined the world to the [[Kolatill system/Legends|Kolatill]], [[Ott system|Ott]], [[Aaris system/Legends|Aaris]], [[Corjain system/Legends|Corjain]], and [[Mairne system/Legends|Mairne systems]]. From Charis, it took twenty-one [[Standard hour/Legends|hours]] to travel to [[Kolatill]], fourteen hours to reach [[Corjain]], twelve hours to transit to [[Mairne]], thirteen hours to get to [[Gandle Ott]], and a [[Standard day/Legends|day]] and three hours to arrive at [[Aaris III]]. Charis was considered to be an important planet in the Kathol [[Sector/Legends|sector]], with industries that focused on manufacturing and information technologies. The [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] sector [[Moff/Legends|Moff]], [[Kentor Sarne]]—who declared himself a [[Warlord/Legends|warlord]] following the [[Death/Legends|death]] of [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] at the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]]—kept a large [[Fleet/Legends|fleet]] formation, known as the [[Charis Fleet]], in the [[Star system/Legends|system]] under the [[Commander/Legends|command]] of [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Pertaal Logris]]. By [[8 ABY/Legends|8 ABY]], Charis supported a population of 850 million inhabitants.<ref name="tdc" />

==History==
An important planet in the Kathol sector, Charis fell under Imperial rule when the Empire took control of the Kathol sector, and later was under the sway of Imperial warlord Moff Kentor Sarne when he withdrew the sector from the Empire following the Battle of [[Endor/Legends|Endor]]. By [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]], the planet had around one billion inhabitants, until the population staged a violent [[Charis uprising|uprising]] against Sarne's authority. Sarne's retaliation was brutal; Imperial forces—including the [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]] [[FarStar|''Renegade'']]—[[Subjugation of Charis|assaulted]] the planet, reducing many [[City/Legends|cities]] to smoking wasteland, and killing around 150 million beings.<ref name="tdc" />

Following the [[Battle of Kal'Shebbol|liberation]] of [[Kal'Shebbol/Legends|Kal'Shebbol]] by [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[New Republic task force (Kal'Shebbol)|forces]] in 8 ABY,<ref name="tsb">{{DarkStryder|adventure=The Saga Begins|book=The DarkStryder Campaign}}</ref> insurgents and sympathizers on Charis plotted to stage a second uprising. However, due to the Imperial counterattack they suffered four [[Standard year/Legends|years]] previously, they required support and encouragement from the New Republic in order to enact their plan.<ref name="tdc" />

==Locations==
Charis was home to several cities. However, following the harsh subjugation of the planet in 4 ABY, many of the planet's major cities were reduced to bombed-out ruins.<ref name="tdc" />

==Behind the scenes==
Charis was described in ''[[The DarkStryder Campaign]]'', a [[1995]] supplement for ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]'' by [[West End Games]]. Charis was later mentioned in ''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''—in the entry for the Kathol sector—and ''[[The Essential Atlas]]''.
